title: International Space Station Expeditions
description: The first long-term space station mission was Expedition 1 beginning in 2000. The orbital outpost has been occupied ever since hosting over 270 individuals.
text:
Expedition 74
Expedition 74 began on Dec. 8, 2025, and will end in Summer 2026. The crew will welcome the SpaceX Crew-12 mission in the Spring while continuing to conduct advanced space…
